sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 16.29 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.16)

statement.latex: Which finite simple groups of Lie type$G$have the following property: for every semisimple abelian subgroup$A$and proper subgroup$H$of$G$there exists$x G$such that$A^x H=1$? This property holds when$A$is a cyclic subgroup (J.\,Siemons, A.\,Zalesskii, J.\,Alge\-bra, 256 (2002), 611--625), as well as when$A$is contained in some maximal torus and$G=PSL_n(q)$(J.\,Siemons, A.\,Zalesskii, J.\,Alge\-bra,...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
